name: Breath Out
description: Final exhale releasing all remaining tension

prompts.label: final exhale releasing all remaining tension into stillness
prompts.text: final exhale releasing all remaining tension into stillness, ultra-clean UI interaction, pure sine tone at concert pitch, whisper-quiet elegance, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine, with natural decay

prompts.label: soft breath out settling body and mind to rest
prompts.text: soft breath out settling body and mind to rest, Swiss design precision, tapped crystal glass rim, zen garden calm, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, transparent, smooth fade out

prompts.label: last air leaving with warmth and gentle whisper
prompts.text: last air leaving with warmth and gentle whisper, white gallery silence, single piano key softly pressed, paper-thin delicacy, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine, sustained resonance

prompts.label: diaphragm relaxing as lungs empty completely
prompts.text: diaphragm relaxing as lungs empty completely, Scandinavian living room, porcelain bowl struck with felt tip, breath-held anticipation, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, transparent, with natural decay

prompts.label: silence rushing in to fill the space left by breath
prompts.text: silence rushing in to fill the space left by breath, frosted glass partition, tuning fork resonating on wood, snow falling on still water, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine, smooth fade out
